contentBlocks.original:
अंजनीगर्भ संभूत कपीन्द्र सचिवोत्तम ।
रामप्रिय नमस्तुभ्यं हनुमन् रक्ष सर्वदा ॥
contentBlocks.transliteration:
añjanīgarbha sambhūta kapīndra sacivottama .
rāmapriya namastubhyaṃ hanuman rakṣa sarvadā ..
contentBlocks.translation: I take refuge in Hanuman who was born from the womb of mother Anjani, and who was the most excellent minister of the king of monkeys (i.e. Sugriva), who is extremely dear to Sri Rama; I bow to you, O Hanuman, please protect me always.
contentBlocks.meanings: अंजनीगर्भ (añjanīgarbha) – born from Anjani's womb (añjanī:Anjani | garbha:womb); संभूत (sambhūta) – born; कपीन्द्र (kapīndra) – king of monkeys (kapi:monkey | indra:king); सचिवोत्तम (sacivottama) – most excellent minister (saciva:minister | uttama:most excellent); रामप्रिय (rāmapriya) – dear to Rama (rāma:Rama | priya:dear); नमस्तुभ्यं (namastubhyaṃ) – salutations to you (namaḥ:salutations | tubhyaṃ:to you); हनुमन् (hanuman) – Hanuman; रक्ष (rakṣa) – protect; सर्वदा (sarvadā) – always;
